parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ workflow: 'creative-divergence', projectId: $json.projectId, runId: $json.runId, result: { visions: $json.visions, survivors: $json.survivors, recommendation: $json.recommendation, survivorCount: $json.survivorCount }, completedAt: $json.completedAt }) }}
